required_preferences.fact: Uses a standing desk at work and alternates between standing and sitting throughout the day — avoids sitting more than two hours total on any workday

supersedes.fact: Sets hourly reminders to stretch at her desk — never goes more than two hours without movement

required_preferences.fact: Alternates weekly Wednesday dinners with her sister to Thursdays or occasional weekend lunches to accommodate live online classes on class nights; flexible scheduling replaces fixed tradition.

supersedes.fact: Hosts weekly dinners for her sister every Wednesday — never moves the date without advance notice

required_preferences.fact: Sets out clothes the night before workdays — never chooses outfits in the morning
Schedules recurring weekday appointments for her sister—doctor visits, nursery setup, and check-ins—prioritizing family support over previous social and hobby activities.
Includes her partner in Saturday morning park walks when possible, prioritizing shared activities
Shares meal preparation responsibilities with her partner for weekday dinners — prefers collaborative cooking over solo meals

persona: A 28-year-old office administrator supporting a remote sales team
